summary: Custom Reports feature testing completed. All 4 new report endpoints and UI tabs verified. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 tabs render correctly with proper UI components.
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 report endpoints return valid JSON with correct structure
Reports.js correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
Tab switching works correctly between all 4 reports
Filter inputs (Start Date, End Date, Branch, Buyer) are functional
Refresh and Export buttons present on each tab
Data is empty as expected in fresh environment - endpoints return proper empty state responses
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with empty data state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom Reports feature fully tested. Key verifications: 1) Reports page loads at /reports. 2) All 4 tabs render correctly: Dispatch Origin (table with Lot ID, Dispatched, From, Buyer, SKU, Qty, Made At columns), Production by Unit (summary cards with total schedules), Forecast vs Actual (summary cards with Total Forecast, Total Actual, Variance, Accuracy, status badges), Buyer History (summary cards with Total Buyers, Total Dispatch Lots, Total Quantity). 3) Filter inputs work: Start Date, End Date, Branch, Buyer. 4) Apply button triggers filter. 5) Refresh button reloads data. 6) Export button present on each tab. 7) Tab switching works correctly.

backend_api.GET /api/dispatch-by-origin with filters: PASS - Works with start_date, end_date, dispatch_branch
backend_api.GET /api/production-by-unit with filters: PASS - Works with start_date, end_date, branch
backend_api.GET /api/forecast-vs-actual: PASS - Returns summary (with variance metrics), detailed_records, total_records
backend_api.GET /api/forecast-vs-actual with filters: PASS - Works with start_date, end_date, buyer_id
backend_api.GET /api/buyer-dispatch-history: PASS - Returns summary, total_buyers, grand_total_quantity, grand_total_lots
backend_api.GET /api/buyer-dispatch-history with fil: PASS - Works with start_date, end_date, buyer_name, buyer_id

frontend_ui.Tab 2 - Production by Unit: PASS - Summary cards with total schedules
frontend_ui.Tab 3 - Forecast vs Actual: PASS - Summary cards with variance metrics and status badges
frontend_ui.Tab 4 - Buyer History: PASS - Summary cards with buyer stats
